# Publication or code change

## Scope
- [ ] This PR changes only the intended subsystem.
- [ ] No paid API, proprietary SDK, closed model or SaaS dependency was added.
- [ ] Analyzed repository code is not executed.

## Verification
- [ ] RED test was observed before implementation for behavior changes.
- [ ] Unit tests pass.
- [ ] Adversarial/negative tests cover external or security-sensitive input.
- [ ] Documentation and rollback notes are included.

## Publication gate
- [ ] This is not an automatic merge.
- [ ] Reports have exact SHA, manifest and checksums.
- [ ] No active secrets or sensitive evidence are included.
